title: `h5r.get_name` has unchecked malloc
author: devdanzin
body:
Same pattern as `h5i.get_name`. Should use `emalloc` (which checks for NULL) instead of raw `malloc`.
- `h5r.pyx:141`

comments.author: neutrinoceros
comments.body:
Fun, I just found one case where we already use `emalloc` but *still* check for a NULL pointer
https://github.com/h5py/h5py/blob/6dd4531f1d1ac8de5b208ae744c260d5fa1fc025/h5py/_conv.templ.pyx#L545-L547

I assume the check is actually not ever going to fail so I'll also clean it while I'm at it.
